name: fit4110-lab02-openapi-contract
description: FIT4110 Lab 02 OpenAPI 3.1 contract-first student repository

scripts.lint:report: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('evidence/buoi-02',{recursive:true})" && npx -y @stoplight/spectral-cli@6.11.1 lint openapi.yaml --ruleset campus-spectral.yaml --format text > evidence/buoi-02/spectral-report.txt
